extension.description: 8 stunning themes + 3 icon packs for VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf & more. Dark, Light, Night, Ghibli, Fury, Kiro, NVIM & Blur. Reduce eye strain and boost your coding productivity.
lynx.liquid.install.success.mac: ✔️ macOS Vibrancy effect installed. 🔄 Restart VSCode to activate it.
lynx.liquid.install.success.linux: ✔️ Linux transparency effect installed. 🔄 Restart VSCode to activate it.
lynx.liquid.install.success.win: ✔️ Windows Transparent effect installed. 🔄 Restart VSCode to activate it.
lynx.liquid.uninstall.success.mac: macOS Vibrancy effect removed. 🔄 Restart VSCode.
lynx.liquid.uninstall.success.win: Windows Transparent effect removed. 🔄 Restart VSCode.
lynx.liquid.prompt.mac: [Lynx Theme Pro] Administrator permissions are required to apply the vibrancy effect on macOS. You will be prompted for your password.
lynx.liquid.prompt.linux: [Lynx Theme Pro Liquid] Administrator permissions are required to apply the transparency effect. Continue?
lynx.liquid.prompt.win: [Lynx Theme Pro] Administrator permissions are required to modify VSCode installation in C:\Program Files. A UAC prompt will appear.
lynx.liquid.error.notFound: [Lynx Liquid] VSCode files not found. Editor: {0}. Detail: {1}
lynx.liquid.error.linux.notFound: [Lynx Liquid] VSCode files not found. Editor: {0}. If you use a VSCode fork, open an issue. Detail: {1}
lynx.liquid.error.linux.snapFlatpak: [Lynx Liquid] {0} not supported — install VSCode as .deb to use this effect.
lynx.liquid.error.linux.noElevate: [Lynx Liquid] Cannot elevate permissions in this session. Restart VSCode normally and try again.
lynx.liquid.error.linux.noPkexec: [Lynx Liquid] pkexec (Polkit) is required to write to the VSCode directory. Install it and try again.
